name: gata-highlighting
description: Language support for the Gata systems language (.g) — syntax highlighting, real-time syntax diagnostics, and on-save semantic checks from the real appa compiler.

scripts.compile: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run build

gata.enableSemanticChecks.description: Run the real 'appa check' compiler command on save/open for any .g file that belongs to a project (a discoverable *.gconf), surfacing real type/semantic diagnostics alongside the always-on syntax checks. Has no effect on loose files outside a project.

gata.appaPath.description: Path to an Appa.dll (run via 'dotnet') or a standalone appa/appa.exe binary. Leave empty to auto-detect a debug build of Appa.csproj next to this checkout (Appa/bin/Debug/net10.0/Appa.dll or .../Release/...), falling back to an 'appa' binary on PATH.

gata.libgataPath.description: Path to the libgata directory passed to 'appa check' as --stdlib. Leave empty to auto-detect a sibling Gata/libgata checkout, or to rely on appa's own installed toolchain (from 'appa setup') if neither is found.
